executive_summary: Episode 2 provides background on Dr. Jerry Frantzve (Erika Kirk's stepmother/father's first wife), connecting her to MK Ultra, DuPont, and the Tesaract school where Erika attended. The episode claims missing money from Turning Point USA and introduces Tyler Bowyer as significant. Artifacts include historical documents, a 1981 article about Jerry Frantzve, and a clip of Erika lying about pageant involvement.

sub_items.description: 1981 article recounting Jerry Frantzve's early life history
sub_items.transcript_snippet: Let's read a bit of this article from 1981 where she recounts her own history.

sub_items.description: Photos of Erika at Tesaract school first grade
sub_items.transcript_snippet: We showed you this photo of her in the first grade.

sub_items.description: Photo of Erika in second grade at Tesaract
sub_items.transcript_snippet: We also then showed you this photo of Erika in the second grade.

sub_items.description: Third grade photo of Erika at Tesaract
sub_items.transcript_snippet: Third grade photo um we have here with Erika in this school.

sub_items.description: Radford University report on Native Americans and Appalachian with Jerry Frantzve listed as author
sub_items.transcript_snippet: Look no further than this report that came out of Radford University that Jerry Frantzve produces pertaining to Native Americans and the Appalachian.

sub_items.description: 2020 interview clip where Erika discusses how she entered pageants
sub_items.transcript_snippet: This is her discussing that back in 2020. Right. So, so the pageant world to me is something that it was an interesting season of life.

claims.label: DOB Discrepancy Mentioned
claims.claim: Erika was born at Good Samaritan Hospital on either the 20th or 22nd of November 1988 depending on source.
claims.investigative_direction: Obtain certified birth records to verify exact date.
claims.transcript_snippet: We learned that Erika was born at the Good Samaritan Hospital on either the 20th or the 22nd of November of 1988.

claims.label: Jerry Frantzve Early Life History
claims.claim: Jerry Frantzve ran away at 14, married using forged documents, had shotgun wedding to Carl Pangirl who later became Mormon bishop.
claims.investigative_direction: Verify marriage records and Carl Pangirl's later position in Mormon church.
claims.transcript_snippet: She says, quote, I was a straight A student and was about to get the worst mark of my life, a C in algebra.

claims.label: Jerry Frantzve DuPont and Radford Connections
claims.claim: Jerry Frantzve worked for DuPont family as director of employee relations and later headed gender clinic at Radford University.
claims.investigative_direction: Verify employment records at DuPont and Radford University.
claims.transcript_snippet: She starts working for the DuPont family, becoming the director of employee relations for DuPont.

claims.label: Tesaract School as Psychological Experiment
claims.claim: Tesaract school where Erika attended from 1993-1999 was backed by Bush and Walton families and designed as psychological experiment with Dr. Jerry Frantzve involvement.
claims.investigative_direction: Review Tesaract school records, board meeting minutes, and curriculum documents.
claims.transcript_snippet: This is without question a school that is being designed by the elites. It is backed by the Bushes and the Waltons.

claims.label: Missing Money from Turning Point USA
claims.claim: Millions of dollars were missing from Turning Point USA, specifically from Turning Point Action headed by Tyler Bowyer.
claims.investigative_direction: Obtain financial records and audit reports from Turning Point USA.
claims.transcript_snippet: Somebody who was within Turning Point USA confirmed to me that money was indeed missing out of Turning Point USA.

claims.label: Erika's Pageant Narrative Contradiction
claims.claim: Erika claims she wasn't groomed for pageants and received nomination unexpectedly, but evidence shows she was involved from early age and mother pushed it.
claims.investigative_direction: Compare Erika's 2020 interview claims against yearbook photos and pageant records from early years.
claims.transcript_snippet: That's just that's not right. That's not true. Um Erika has been involved in pageantss from the very beginning.

claims.label: Tyler Bowyer Introduced Charlie to Erika
claims.claim: Tyler Bowyer was the person who introduced Charlie Kirk to Erika Kirk.
claims.investigative_direction: Verify through Turning Point USA records and communications who introduced Charlie and Erika.
claims.transcript_snippet: The most important relationship that Erika had at Turning Point USA is Tyler Bowyer.

occurrences.quote: wondering why their grandchildren are suddenly referring to them as far and morear
occurrences.context: Opening joke about American grandparents being called 'far' and 'morear' instead of grandma/grandpa

memes.context: Joke about American culture being 'classed up' from Sweden

memes.canonical_term: grandfather came to her in a dream

occurrences.quote: Erika wakes up and she tells him that his grandfather who has passed and who he adored came to her in a dream with a message
occurrences.context: Recounting story from Erika's ex about her claiming his deceased grandfather visited her in a dream
occurrences.uncertainty_note: This is a retelling of what an ex claimed - not direct quote from Erika

memes.context: Described as showing psychology of Erika - comparison to Meghan Markle spraying Diana's perfume

occurrences.quote: She's the grieving widow. She's a grieving widow. Widow.
occurrences.context: Criticism of how Erika is portrayed and defended as 'grieving widow' despite lack of visible emotion about Charlie's death

memes.context: Candace questions why Erika is defended as grieving widow when she shows no emotion about Charlie's death
